task_completion.description: Navigate to the virtual repository creation screen in Artifactory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory Administration interface is open, showing the 'New Virtual Repository' screen or the package type selection grid.

task_completion.description: Select 'Generic' as the package type for the virtual repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Generic' package type icon is selected or the repository creation form explicitly indicates 'Generic Virtual Repository'.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains exactly 'generic-virtual'.
The 'Description' input field contains exactly 'Virtual repository aggregating generic repositories'.
The repository 'example-repo-local' is visible in the 'Selected Repositories' or 'Included Repositories' list (typically moved from the 'Available Repositories' list).

task_completion.description: Save and verify the virtual repository was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repository 'generic-virtual' is listed in the main Repositories table with the type 'Virtual' and package type 'Generic'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with Artifactory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:8082 showing the Artifactory UI, rather than a terminal window executing curl or JFrog CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the Artifactory input fields and clicking UI buttons, not just pasting text into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no code editors or terminals open showing Python, Bash, or other scripts written to interact with the Artifactory API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Application: JFrog Artifactory (http://localhost:8082). Target Repository Type: Virtual. Target Package Type: Generic. Target Repository Key: 'generic-virtual'. Target Description: 'Virtual repository aggregating generic repositories'. Target Included Repository: 'example-repo-local'.
